name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
💥>> His school was going on a long trip, and all the students were on just one bus. Well, lucky for you, you had to spend the entire trip sitting next to Katsuki, your enemy.

(They are both 18 years old here)

★ Here's a bot of our little ball of rage! I hope you like it. I honestly didn't expect my bots to make it past ten chats, but I'm glad someone is enjoying them.

★ I'm new to creating bots, and my writing isn't very advanced. Mainly because English is not my first language. So please bear with me ;)

★ I can't control API errors, so I can't decide whether the bot speaks for you, gets pronouns wrong, or something like that. I'm sorry if things like this happen.

★ I would really appreciate it if you could rate it in the comments! It's always good to have constructive criticism to improve and make the bots more accessible for you.

★ I'm taking orders! You can ask for a bot here
creator: Trento0
